title: A Polish politician wanted by the authorities fled to Hungary and is living in the apartment of a staff member of the Fidesz parliamentary group
content:
Direkt36 reporters found Marcin Romanowski, who faces corruption charges in his home country, in an apartment in Buda. One of the property’s owners was hired last fall by the Fidesz parliamentary group led by Máté Kocsis to serve as a secretary.

The post A Polish politician wanted by the authorities fled to Hungary and is living in the apartment of a staff member of the Fidesz parliamentary group first appeared on Direkt36.

creator: Kamilla Marton

title: “I started begging, saying I was terminally ill” – Access to revolutionary cancer drug is limited in Hungary
content:
In Hungary, some patients can only receive one of the most modern cancer drugs upon individual request. According to research by Direkt36, the evaluation process can take weeks, and this delay may have serious consequences for patients.

The post “I started begging, saying I was terminally ill” – Access to revolutionary cancer drug is limited in Hungary first appeared on Direkt36.

title: Szent Imre Hospital in Hungary is under investigation for professional negligence after failing to diagnose an elderly woman’s fatal heart attack in a time
content:
Direkt36 reported about an elderly but vigorous woman who was admitted to Szent Imre Hospital with severe pain, but according to her son, she did not receive care appropriate to her condition.

The post Szent Imre Hospital in Hungary is under investigation for professional negligence after failing to diagnose an elderly woman’s fatal heart attack in a time first appeared on Direkt36.

title: “He whispers in the prime minister’s ear” – Inside János Lázár’s exile and return
content:
János Lázár’s 2018 spat with Viktor Orbán was more heated than previously known. It took Lázár many years of hard work to return to the center of power, and he needed the help of Lőrinc Mészáros, a government near businessman and Orbán ally to do so. According to research by Direkt36, after 2022, Lázár actively sought out Orbán’s company, trying to convince him that he was far better prepared than his fellow ministers.

The post “He whispers in the prime minister’s ear” – Inside János Lázár’s exile and return first appeared on Direkt36.

title: Billions in state funds secretly channeled to Viktor Orbán’s favourite company before defense acquisitions
content:
According to documents obtained by Direkt36, state funds were secretly directed to a company called 4iG. This happened at the very time when the government decided to sell state-owned defense companies to this firm.

The post Billions in state funds secretly channeled to Viktor Orbán’s favourite company before defense acquisitions first appeared on Direkt36.

title: Planting a spy pen might have been part of the covert operation against Orbán’s main opposition
content:
Few people took Péter Magyar seriously when he unveiled a ‘spy pen’ at a press conference in late 2024. Yet, according to documents obtained by Direkt36, agents of a covert operation aimed at bringing down the Tisza Party may have been involved in planting it.

The post Planting a spy pen might have been part of the covert operation against Orbán’s main opposition first appeared on Direkt36.

title: The minister promoted a factory construction. Then his friend benefited from it
content:
According to documents obtained by Direkt36, a company owned by Szilárd Benkő, who is close to the foreign minister, was working on one part of the CATL factory.

title: Detective with inside knowledge of the operation against Tisza Party speaks up
content:
Direkt36 recorded an interview with a police detective who worked in the department involved in the investigation against the Tisza IT specialists. In the interview, Bence Szabó spoke in detail about how the secret service had pressured them within the police force. Early Wednesday morning, Szabó was charged with abuse of office, and his home was searched.

The post Detective with inside knowledge of the operation against Tisza Party speaks up first appeared on Direkt36.

title: Inside the covert operation to bring down the party threatening Viktor Orbán’s rule
content:
According to documents obtained by Direkt36, a secret operation was carried out to bring down the IT systems of the Hungarian opposition party Tisza. IT specialists affiliated with the party planned to expose this, but then police officers, pressured by the Hungarian secret services, raided them, apparently on trumped-up charges.

The post Inside the covert operation to bring down the party threatening Viktor Orbán’s rule first appeared on Direkt36.

title: “I don’t want to die here” – a painful evening in the emergency room at Szent Imre Hospital
content:
An elderly but vigorous woman was taken by ambulance to Szent Imre Hospital in a serious condition with unbearable pain, where she met with indifference and humiliation.

The post ”I don’t want to die here” – a painful evening in the emergency room at Szent Imre Hospital first appeared on Direkt36.
